text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After completing the fierce race, Eishin Flash is
overwhelmed with euphoria and doesn't know
what to do with herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once she accepts that these emotions are "right,"
however, her desire to win the spring Tenno Sho
burns ever brighter.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Fuji Kiseki looks on with satisfaction
as the younger generation grows strong enough
to break through the obstacles before them.
